code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut tokens: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if string.len(current) > 0
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            tokens = list_push(tokens, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(current) > 0
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      tokens = list_push(tokens, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  let a = match tokens.get(0) when Some(v) v when None 0 end
  let b = match tokens.get(1) when Some(v) v when None 0 end
  let g = gcd(a, b)
  print("gcd=#{g}")
end

fn list_push(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  import_push(xs, x)
end

fn import_push(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  __list_int_push(xs, x)
end

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let t = x % y
    x = y
    y = t
  end
  x
end
